'''Fierce''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bursa/Legends|bursa]], domesticated and trained by [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] street-corner animal trainer [[Murble]]. Fierce was sickly and stooped with age, with dirt and garbage stuck in her matted fur, [[Rib/Legends|ribs]] showing through her skin, and surrounded by a cloud of [[floater flea]]s. She was able to perform simple tricks. Though fearsome in appearance and perpetually on the verge of starvation, she was quite shy and docile around crowds and was only known to become aggressive if her master was threatened.<ref name="CatCW" />
